About Organization

The Institute Of Engineering And Rural Technology is a premier institution in India offering various diploma courses.

The institution is known for its excellent infrastructure and faculty.


About the Programme

The IERT Entrance Exam is conducted for admissions to various diploma courses offered by the Institute Of Engineering And Rural Technology.

The exam is a great opportunity for students to get admitted to a prestigious institution and pursue their dreams.
